mapper.select: SELECT df.project_code, p.project_name, df.folder_code, df.folder_name, df.created_on, df.header_folder_code, dfh.folder_name AS headerFolderName, df.user_code, u.name FROM documents_folders df LEFT OUTER JOIN documents_folders dfh ON df.header_folder_code = dfh.folder_code LEFT OUTER JOIN users u ON u.user_code = df.user_code LEFT JOIN projects p ON df.project_code = p.project_code WHERE ( #{admin} = 1 OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VW_USER_PROJECT_AUTH vupa WHERE vupa.user_code = #{userCode} AND vupa.project_code = df.project_code AND vupa.category = '문서' AND vupa.rd_rol = 'Y' ) ) ORDER BY NVL(dfh.folder_name, df.folder_name), df.folder_name

SELECT DISTINCT p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName FROM projects p WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM VW_USER_PROJECT_AUTH vupa WHERE vupa.user_code = #{userCode} AND vupa.project_code = p.project_code AND vupa.category = '문서' AND vupa.rd_rol = 'Y' AND p.status IN ('OD1','OD3') /* 필요하다면 상태 조건 유지 */ ) ORDER BY p.project_code
